zh.of Ingham, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可英厄姆

zh.King's Lynn, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可金也斯 琳
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Bardolph於大約1380年出生時，她的父親William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf32歲，母親Agnes Poynings32歲。她和Sir Brian Stapleton至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1432年在英國諾福爾可英厄姆享年53歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可英厄姆。

zh-hans.of Ingham, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可英厄姆

zh-hans.King's Lynn, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可金也斯 琳
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Bardolph于大约1380年出生时，她的父亲William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf32岁，母亲Agnes Poynings32岁。她和Sir Brian Stapleton至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1432年在英国諾福爾可英厄姆享年53岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可英厄姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bardolph
meanings: From the name Bertulph; renowned for help.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Bardolph was born about 1380, her father, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, was 32 and her mother, Agnes Poynings, was 32. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Brian Stapleton. She died in 1432, in Ingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Ingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Bardolph est née environ 1380, son père, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes Poynings, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Brian Stapleton. Elle est décédée en 1432, à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Bardolph um 1380 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf 32 und ihre Mutter Agnes Poynings 32. Sie hatte mit Sir Brian Stapleton mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1432 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Ingham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Ingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Bardolph è nata il circa 1380, sua padre, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Agnes Poynings, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Brian Stapleton. Morì nel 1432, nel Ingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Ingham, Norfolk, England.

ja.Ingham Priory, Ingham, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクインガム

ja.King's Lynn, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リン
ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Bardolphが約1380年に生まれた時，父William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolfは32歳，母Agnes Poyningsは32歳であった。彼女はSir Brian Stapletonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1432年にイギリスノーフォルクインガムで53歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Bardolph(이)가 대략 1380년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Poynings(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Sir Brian Stapleton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 잉함에 묻혔다.

mn.of Ingham, Norfolk, England: Ingham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
Ingham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Bardolph nasceu aproximadamente 1380, seu pai, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Poynings, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Sir Brian Stapleton. Ela faleceu em 1432, em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Bardolph родилась около 1380 г., её отцу по имени William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Poynings, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Sir Brian Stapleton. Она умерла в 1432 г. в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Bardolph nació aproximadamente 1380, su papá, William Bardolf 4th Baron Bardolf, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Agnes Poynings, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Sir Brian Stapleton. Murió en 1432, en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
